title: Develop and deploy applications on Kubernetes
summary: Create, deploy, and maintain Kubernetes-native applications using AKS.

sections.title: Develop and deploy applications on Kubernetes
sections.summary: Create, deploy, and maintain Kubernetes-native applications using AKS.

lessons.title: Deploy a containerized application on Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:
Explore how to create and deploy a containerized application by using Azure Kubernetes Service declarative manifest files.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/aks-deploy-container-app/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy a containerized application on Azure Kubernetes Service

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop and deploy applications on Kubernetes
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop and deploy applications on Kubernetes**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
